body.description: Filter to export Full/Part of the documentation

entity.description: Entity type to export. Allowed values: "Project", "Version", "Category"

version_id.description: Array of version IDs to export. Required when Entity is "Version". Use empty array [] for "Project" entity.

id.description: The unique identifier  of the language version

code.description: Language code (e.g., "en" for English, "es" for Spanish, "fr" for French, "de" for German)

selected_languages.description: Optional list of languages to include in the export. Leave empty or null to export all languages.

id.description: The unique identifier of the category

language_id.description: The language ID for the category content. Specifies which language version of the category to export.

selected_categories.description: List of categories to include in the export. Required when Entity is "Category". Leave empty or null for "Project" or "Version" entities to export all categories.

exclude_media_files.description: Set to true to exclude media files (images, attachments) from the export, reducing file size. Default is false.

after.description: Filter the articles which are all modified after the given date

before.description: Filter the articles which are all modified before the given date

filter_by_article_modified_at.description: Optional date range filter to export only articles modified within the specified period.

export_type.description: Export format type. 0 = JSON format (default), 1 = HTML (Offline Documentation).

Export - Complete Project.summary: To export the complete project, set Entity as 'Project'. All versions, languages, and categories will be automatically included. VersionId, SelectedLanguages, and SelectedCategories will be populated automatically.

Export - One or more project versions (a.summary: To export one or more project versions with all languages and categories, set Entity as 'Version' and provide VersionId array. All languages and categories for the specified versions will be automatically included. Use /projectversions API to get version IDs.

Export - Specific versions with selected.summary: To export specific versions with selected languages, set Entity as 'Version' and provide both VersionId and SelectedLanguages. Categories for the specified versions and languages will be automatically included. If SelectedLanguages is not provided, all languages for the versions will be included.

Export - Specific categories.summary: To export specific categories, set Entity as 'Category' and provide SelectedCategories with Id, LanguageId, and VersionId for each category. VersionId array and SelectedLanguages will be automatically derived from the provided categories.
